content.rendered:
The injury Loya.

Our firm delivers real results without the gimmicks. Just relentless advocacy, strategic expertise, and results that speak for themselves. We work for injured individuals and families with the precision of seasoned trial lawyers and the integrity of people who care.

Schedule Your Free Consultation
Call (832) 699-LOYA

About the firm

The Loya Law Firm, based in Houston, Texas, focuses on significant personal injury cases involving wrongful death, traumatic brain injuries, truck and 18-wheeler wrecks, refinery and plant explosions, workplace injuries, and other acts of negligence. We approach every case with precision, persistence, and the determination to win for our clients. When someone’s life has been turned upside down by injury or loss, they deserve a firm that will fight with skill, conviction, and the courage to never settle for less. We maximize results, and just as importantly, we treat every client with the attention, care, integrity, and respect they deserve.

Learn More

Practice Areas

We handle all sorts of injury cases throughout Texas, including in Harris County, Montgomery County, Galveston County, Fort Bend County, Brazoria County, Bexar County, Travis County, Matagorda County and Wharton County. When other lawyers need a lawyer, they call us.

Truck/18-Wheeler Wrecks

Workplace Injuries

Wrongful Deaths

Refinery/Plant Explosions

Trip and Fall Injuries

Maritime/Offshore Injuries

Brain/Burn/Amputation Injuries

Uber/Lyft Accidents

Electrocution Injuries

Crane Accidents

Dog Bite/Animal Attacks

Walmart Shootings

Other Negligent Acts

Our Lawyers

We believe your story matters. You are not just a case file. You are a person whose life was changed by someone else’s carelessness, and we are here to make that right. No opponent is too powerful, no case too complex. You deserve a lawyer that will fight with skill and conviction and not settle for less. We are not a volume firm, and we don’t hand off our clients to someone else. When you hire The Loya Law Firm, you get us— dedicated, hands-on advocates who treat your case like it’s our own. We prepare every matter as if it’s going to trial because that’s how real results are achieved.

Partner & Trial Lawyer

Ryan Loya

Managing Partner

Kylie Loya

Results & Testimonials

“Ryan assumed representation in my case right before the Statute of Limitations ran out. I was beyond grateful, especially since the first attorney that I had never did anything and Ryan took my case to trial. Beyond his professional duties, I regarded him as a close confidant. Ryan consistently prioritized my emotional well-being, avoiding mere responses that merely soothed my concerns. [...] I would not hesitate to use Ryan again if I needed to.”
— LaTasha J.
"In November 2024, when my [other] lawyer tried to take more than their fair share I decided to get Ryan & Kylie's advice. ...Ryan’s voice gave me the assurance that I would be taken care of by him. And that’s what he did within two short months he got me what I deserved and then some. And on top of that he did everything pro bono although I offered him whatever amount as his fees but he declined saying that it was nothing. But it meant a world of difference to me after how I was treated by my own personal injury team as compared to how Ryan took care of my legal issues. I am forever grateful and feel blessed to have known Kylie and Ryan."
— Attiya B.
"Ryan is an exceptional lawyer whose professionalism, strong defense strategies, and genuine care for his clients truly set him apart. There is no other lawyer like him—his dedication and outstanding advocacy have made a tremendous difference in my experience and I fully endorse his services."
—  Celeste H.
